Our Services

Care that fits
your life

Three focused services designed around continuity, honesty, and real access to your provider. All delivered via telehealth across Florida.

01

Primary Care

Routine visits, medication management, chronic condition care — all from a provider who knows your full history. Hypertension, diabetes, cholesterol, hypothyroidism, GERD, and more.

Learn More
02

Weight Loss

Clinically supervised weight management with GLP-1 evaluation. Initial consultation, medication-assisted options, and ongoing monitoring with real provider oversight.

Learn More
03

TRT Evaluation

Lab-driven testosterone assessment with honest evaluation. Comprehensive symptom review, bloodwork panels, and ongoing monitoring if treatment is appropriate.

Learn More
How It Works

Getting started is simple

01

Book online

Schedule through our secure HIPAA-compliant patient portal. Same-week availability.

02

Complete your intake

Brief health history — your provider reviews it before your visit so you spend time on care, not paperwork.

03

Meet your provider

Connect via telehealth and build a care plan together. Follow-ups, labs, and prescriptions managed through the portal.

Not sure where
to start?

Book a visit or send us a question. We'll help you figure out the right path forward.

Book a Visit Ask a Question

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance. Same-week appointments.
